essence: Cultivates and cares for outdoor spaces, bringing life, colour, and balance to natural environments.

identity.title: Gardener
identity.summary: Maintains gardens, plants, lawns, and outdoor spaces through planting, pruning, soil care, and seasonal upkeep.

salary.notes: Self‑employed gardeners, estate gardeners, and specialist horticulturists can exceed £45k–£60k+ depending on clientele and expertise.

qualifications: Knowledge of Plants, Soil, and Seasonal Care
Experience with Tools, Machinery, and Garden Maintenance
Understanding of Pest Control and Plant Health

lifestyle.description: Gardeners work outdoors in peaceful, natural environments where physical activity and plant knowledge come together. Days involve planting flowers and shrubs, mowing lawns, pruning trees, managing soil health, and keeping gardens tidy throughout the seasons. The work is physical and weather‑dependent, often requiring early starts and steady pacing. While conditions can be muddy, hot, or cold, the rewards are immediate and deeply satisfying — watching a garden grow, bloom, and thrive under your care. This lifestyle suits individuals who enjoy nature, hands‑on work, and creating beautiful, living spaces.

habits: Plans tasks around weather and seasons
Manages soil quality and watering schedules
